quotes.text: I don't know what I'm doing. But my LLM does. I set up site-to-site VPNs with Mikrotek in fifteen minutes, rather than the day-long exercise of googling and praying.
quotes.author: zulux
quotes.source: Hacker News — HomeLab #1: MikroTik as a Home Router
quotes.extraction_note: Humorous, standalone insight about using LLMs to bypass complexity in networking, resonant with tech pragmatism and anti-complexity ethos.
